2606.25956.title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
2606.25956.paper_summary: Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac biomarkers with rich pulmonary vascular information; we add vascular biomarkers to tabular models and apply graph neural networks (GNNs) on the vascular tree's intrinsic graph representation. We use a private dataset (n=353) with uniquely complete data for PE risk stratification. Our results show that, among global features, medical records and cardiac biomarkers are the most significant predictors, while vascular biomarkers do not further improve stratification. Even more surprising, even GNNs on vascular graphs fail to outperform strong tabular baseline on global features. We consider hypotheses, on both models and data, that could explain this suboptimal performance. Our investigation suggests that, counter-intuitively, vascular graphs might hold no discriminative information for PE risk stratification. Code is available from https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS.
2606.25956.paper_summary_zh: 風險分層對於肺栓塞（PE）的臨床決策至關重要。分層指南基於患者的醫療記錄、從計算機斷層肺動脈造影（CTPA）測量的參數以及血液檢測。然而，常規實踐中血液檢測往往缺失。本研究探討最先進的模型是否能僅根據醫療記錄和從CTPA影像中提取的生物標記準確分類風險分層。我們基準不同的方法來結合醫療記錄和心臟生物標記，並利用豐富的肺血管信息；我們將血管生物標記添加到表格模型中，並在血管樹的內在圖形表示上應用圖神經網絡（GNNs）。我們使用一個私有數據集（n=353），該數據集具有獨特的完整數據以進行PE風險分層。我們的結果顯示，在全球特徵中，醫療記錄和心臟生物標記是最重要的預測因子，而血管生物標記並未進一步改善分層。更令人驚訝的是，即使在血管圖上的GNN也未能超越強大的表格基線在全球特徵上的表現。我們考慮可能解釋這一次優化性能的假設，無論是在模型還是數據上。我們的調查表明，反直覺地，血管圖可能不包含PE風險分層的區分信息。代碼可從 https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS 獲得。
2606.25956.author: Nathan Painchaud et.al.
2606.25956.authors: Nathan Painchaud, Tristan Habémont, Morgane des Ligneris, Allan Serva, Pierre Croisille, Laurent Bertoletti, Thomas Lampert, Johannes F. Lutzeyer, Odyssée Merveille
